title: Smokers with high blood pressure: 10 herbal teas to try
description: Taraxacum officinale teas, also known as dandelion root tea, may be beneficial for high blood pressure due to its diuretic properties and high content of potassium, calcium, and magnesium. These minerals help to relax blood vessels, reduce blood pressure, and promote the excretion of excess fluids from the body.
